mapper.sql: id, user_id, record_date, record_type, category_id, category_name, amount, client_id, session_id, payment_method, is_reimbursable, invoice_no, remark, attachments, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_finance ( user_id, record_date, record_type, category_id, category_name, amount, client_id, session_id, payment_method, is_reimbursable, invoice_no, remark, attachments, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{recordDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{recordType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{categoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentMethod, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isReimbursable, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_finance WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_finance ORDER BY record_date DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_finance WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY record_date DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT f., FROM t_finance f WHERE f.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT f., FROM t_finance f
WHERE f.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY f.record_date DESC, f.create_time DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0.00 END), 0.00) AS incomeAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0.00 END), 0.00) AS expenseAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalRecordCount FROM t_finance WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND YEAR(record_date) = #{year, jdbcType=INTEGER} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_finance ( user_id, record_date, record_type, category_id, category_name, amount, client_id, session_id, payment_method, is_reimbursable, invoice_no, remark, attachments, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.recordDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.recordType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.categoryId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.categoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sessionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.paymentMethod, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isReimbursable, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.invoiceNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.attachments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_finance WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
